P(D).description: Prior probability that the wheelchair user intends to navigate through the door.

P(S).description: Prior probability that the wheelchair user intends to proceed straight to the other side of the room.

P(T).description: Prior probability that the wheelchair user intends to turn slightly right and stop at a table.

P(J|D).description: Probability of the joystick being pointed straight given the user intends to go through the door.

P(J|S).description: Probability of the joystick being pointed straight given the user intends to go straight.

P(J|T).description: Probability of the joystick being pointed straight given the user intends to stop at the table.
